title: Update dependency org.springframework.security:spring-security-bom to v7
issue_text:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>spring-projects/spring-security (org.springframework.security:spring-security-bom)</summary>

### [`v7.0.3`](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/releases/tag/7.0.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/compare/7.0.2...7.0.3)

#### :star: New Features

- Fix Javadoc warnings in spring-security-web [#​18473](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/pull/18473)
- Fix/gradle 9 deprecations [#​18485](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/issues/18485)
- Fix/gradle 9 deprecations [#​18477](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/pull/18477)
- Replace method call with 'Builder.configureMessageConverters()' [#​18378](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/pull/18378)
- Replacing use of deprecated 'check' in authorization documentation [#​18390](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/pull/18390)
- Use DefaultParameterNameDiscoverer#getSharedInstance [#​18481](https://redirect.github.com/spring-projects/spring-security/pull/18481)

#### :beetle: Bug Fix
